2605.20128.title: MixRea: Benchmarking Explicit-Implicit Reasoning in Large Language Models
2605.20128.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into high-stakes decision-making. Inspired by the theory of \emph{inattentional blindness} in human cognition, we investigate whether LLMs, trained on human-preferred corpora that embed attentional biases, exhibit a similar limitation: \emph{failing to attend to subtle yet important contextual cues under explicit task instructions}. To evaluate this, we introduce the task of \textbf{explicit-implicit reasoning} and present \textbf{MixRea}, a benchmark of 2,246 multiple-choice questions across 9 reasoning types with varying distributions of explicit and implicit information. Evaluation of 21 advanced LLMs shows that even the best-performing reasoning model (Gemini 2.5 Pro) achieves only 42.8\% consistency, revealing widespread inattentional blindness. To mitigate this, we propose \textbf{Potential Relation Completion Prompting (PRCP)}, a prompting method that improves reasoning by recovering overlooked causal relations. Further analysis shows that this limitation persists across diverse multi-source reasoning tasks, highlighting the need for more cognitively aligned models.
2605.20128.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地應用於高風險的決策中。受到人類認知中\emph{注意盲點}理論的啟發，我們研究LLMs是否會在訓練於嵌入注意偏見的人類偏好語料庫後，展現出類似的限制：\emph{在明確的任務指示下，未能注意到微妙但重要的上下文線索}。為了評估這一點，我們引入了\textbf{明確-隱含推理}的任務，並呈現\textbf{MixRea}，這是一個包含2,246個多選題的基準，涵蓋9種推理類型，並具有不同的明確和隱含信息分佈。對21個先進LLMs的評估顯示，即使是表現最佳的推理模型（Gemini 2.5 Pro）也僅達到42.8\%的一致性，揭示了普遍存在的注意盲點。為了減輕這一問題，我們提出了\textbf{潛在關係補全提示（PRCP）}，這是一種通過恢復被忽視的因果關係來改善推理的提示方法。進一步分析顯示，這一限制在多元來源的推理任務中仍然存在，突顯了對更符合認知的模型的需求。
2605.20128.author: Yuanqing Cai et.al.
2605.20128.authors: Yuanqing Cai, Ziyi Huang, Minhao Liu, Lixin Duan, Wen Li, Yanru Zhang
